overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city. The clip progresses from a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, past towering megastructures and neon signage, to a busy intersection with moving traffic. The environment features a mix of brutalist concrete architecture and gleaming glass towers under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with concrete barriers

events.description: camera turns right to navigate around building corner

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in green vest walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars spanning across the street
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
tall brutalist building with horizontal window slits and weathered concrete facade
futuristic street light with orange glowing fixture on metal pole

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic urban sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. The camera follows a pedestrian in a green vest walking past a concrete office building with distinctive horizontal architecture. A large digital billboard glows in the distance as the camera turns the corner around the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: exits covered sidewalk to open overlook revealing downtown skyline
camera pans upward to frame the tall red residential tower against blue sky

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway while observing the cityscape and tall towers

entered.detail: slender high-rise building with red and white striped facade and construction scaffolding at top
industrial vent releasing white steam into the air
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and towers in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a breathtaking view of the city skyline as the camera moves along an elevated walkway. A distinctive tall red residential tower dominates the center frame, with steam rising from vents on the left. The camera pans upward to take in the scale of the megastructures before continuing toward a commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with retro diner signage

events.description: approaching street level intersection with commercial buildings and signage
camera turns left to face the crosswalk and oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection near Tom's Diner, waiting at curb for traffic to clear

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing with crossed arms near the diner entrance

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with retro styling mounted on metal framework
massive multi-level building complex with hanging platforms and industrial details
brown street sign indicating Highway 101 mounted on traffic light pole
low concrete wall running along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to street level, revealing the iconic Tom's Diner sign on the right. The environment shifts to a commercial intersection with a massive futuristic megastructure looming ahead. The camera approaches the crosswalk, passing a pedestrian standing near the diner, and waits at the curb near a Highway 101 sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with moving traffic

events.description: beginning to cross street as vehicles pass through intersection
white sedan passes directly in front of camera followed by other vehicles
camera turns right to align with street direction while walking

agents.ego_description: navigating across multi-lane road, timing movement between passing cars

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
woman in yellow shorts waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and street signs
painted white stripes marking pedestrian crossing area

segments.scene_description: The camera steps onto the asphalt crosswalk and begins navigating through moderate traffic. A white sedan passes closely in front, followed by other vehicles moving through the intersection. The camera continues across the multi-lane road, passing a woman waiting at the curb, with the massive megastructure now visible to the left as the perspective shifts to follow the street direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shadowed underbelly of an elevated highway into the sprawling, sunlit scale of a futuristic city center. It begins on a concrete sidewalk, following a pedestrian in a green vest past a brutalist office building before turning a corner toward a glowing digital billboard. As the camera ascends onto an elevated walkway, the view expands to reveal a towering red residential tower and rising steam vents, panning upward to capture the immense scale of the surrounding megastructures. The perspective then descends back to street level, passing the iconic Tom's Diner sign and a Highway 101 marker as it approaches a busy commercial intersection. Finally, the camera steps onto the asphalt crosswalk, navigating through moderate traffic and passing a white sedan before moving toward a massive megastructure looming to the left.
